name: n8n-workflow-generator
description: Generate n8n workflow JSON from plain English using AI
author: Puneeth

scripts.dev:electron: wait-on http://localhost:3579 && cross-env ELECTRON_DEV=true NEXT_DEV_PORT=3579 node scripts/launch-electron.mjs
scripts.build: npm run build:next && npm run build:electron && electron-builder --win
scripts.pack: npm run build:next && npm run build:electron && electron-builder --win --dir
